zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Adam de Musgrave於1170年出生在英國維斯特莫藍德格亞特 馬斯格雷夫時，他的父親Lord Robert de Musgrave24歲，母親Matilda de Carvile20歲。他於1195年與Alicia de Holebec結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1216年在英國維斯特莫藍德桑德福德享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Adam de Musgrave于1170年出生在英国維斯特莫藍德格亞特 馬斯格雷夫时，他的父亲Lord Robert de Musgrave24岁，母亲Matilda de Carvile20岁。他于1195年与Alicia de Holebec结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1216年在英国維斯特莫藍德桑德福德享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Musgrave
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Musgrove
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Musgrave in Cumbria. The placename derives from Old English mūs ‘mouse’ + grāf ‘copse, grove’.

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Adam de Musgrave was born in 1170, in Great Musgrave, Westmorland, England, his father, Lord Robert de Musgrave, was 24 and his mother, Matilda de Carvile, was 20. He married Alicia de Holebec in 1195. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1216, in Sandford, Westmorland, England, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Adam de Musgrave est né en 1170, à Great Musgrave, Westmorland, Angleterre, son père, Lord Robert de Musgrave, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Matilda de Carvile, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Alicia de Holebec en 1195. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1216, à Sandford, Westmorland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Adam de Musgrave 1170 in Great Musgrave, Westmorland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord Robert de Musgrave 24 und seine Mutter Matilda de Carvile 20. Er hat 1195 Alicia de Holebec geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1216 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Sandford, Westmorland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Adam de Musgraveが1170年にイギリスウエストモーランドグレアト ムスグラブで生まれた時，父Lord Robert de Musgraveは24歳，母Matilda de Carvileは20歳であった。1195年にAlicia de Holebecと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1216年にイギリスウエストモーランドサンドフォードで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Adam de Musgrave(이)가 1170년 영국 웨스트모를랜드 그리트 무스그레이브에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Robert de Musgrave(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda de Carvile(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1195년 Alicia de Holebec(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1216년 영국 웨스트모를랜드 샌드퍼드에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Alicia de Holebec em 1195. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1216, em Sandford, Westmorland, Inglaterra, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Adam de Musgrave родился в 1170 г. в местности грит мусграв, вестморланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Lord Robert de Musgrave было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Matilda de Carvile, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Alicia de Holebec в 1195 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1216 г. в местности сэндфорд, вестморланд, Англия в возрасте 46 лет.
